allow: PowerShell($dll = \(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "C:\\Users\\armen\\.nuget\\packages\\microsoft.openapi\\2.4.1" -Filter "Microsoft.OpenApi.dll" | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; if \($dll\) { $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\($dll\); $asm.GetTypes\(\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Namespace | Sort-Object -Unique } else { "DLL not found" })
